testsuite.name: projects.kankan.controller.CardControllerTest

testcase.name: updateCard should return 404 when card to update is not found()
deleteCard should return 404 when card to delete is not found()
addCard should create a new card()
deleteCard should delete a card successfully()
getCardById should return 404 when card not found()
getCardById should return a card when found()
getAllCards should return a list of cards()
updateCard should update an existing card()
